title: 第 71 節
en: Bhadrabahu, name of a Sthavira, Bhadrap.ida, name of a month, 308.
Bhadrtyika, name of a Sakha, 291 Bhagavat, title of Ginas, 36.
Bharadvaga, name of a gotra, 286, Bharatavarsha, 190, 218, &c.
Bhavanapati, one of the four orders of gods, 191, &c.
Birds, young, likened to disciples, Birth, 18.
Brahmadvipika, name of a Sakha, Brahma Kalpa, 195.
Brahmaliptika, name of a Sakha, Bráhmazas and Sramazas, 38, &c.
Brahmasundari, name of a nun, Buddha, epithet of Mahavira, 264.
Clothes, what they should be made of, 157, &c.
Dásikarbazikà, name of a Sakha, Datta (Dinna), name of a Sthavira, De;igazin, name of a Sthavira, 295.
